DisplayDescription:
Ready to set a new personal best with Wildstar Racing Amateur League?

Weave around pylons, duck under cranes, and avoid precarious pipes in this abandoned mining facility as you strive to prevail over the Snake Pit and its venomous turns.

This racetrack was first popularized by the XGR Racing Team.

RACE DETAILS
* LOCATION: Clio
* LENGTH: 10.5 km
* FEATURES: Low-Altitude Flying, Winding Track
